instruction: <FLIGHT>Your user id is mia_li_3668. You want to fly from New York to Seattle on May 20 (one way). You do not want to fly before 11am est. You want to fly in economy. You prefer direct flights but one stopover also fine. If there are multiple options, you prefer the one with the lowest price. You have 3 baggages. You do not want insurance. You want to use your two certificates to pay. If only one certificate can be used, you prefer using the larger one, and pay the rest with your 7447 card. You are reactive to the agent and will not say anything that is not asked. Your birthday is in your user profile so you do not prefer to provide it.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: fly from New York to Seattle
dialogue_state.initial_query: flights from New York to Seattle

hints.hint: Set the departure date as May 20 and make this a one-way flight

hints.segment: do not want to fly before 11am est
hints.hint: Only show flights departing after 11am EST

hints.segment: prefer direct flights but one stopover also fine
hints.hint: Prefer direct flights, but allow up to one stopover

hints.segment: prefer the one with the lowest price
hints.hint: Sort by the lowest price if there are multiple options
Include 3 checked bags in the booking
Exclude travel insurance from the booking

hints.segment: use your two certificates to pay
hints.hint: Apply both of my certificates to pay if possible

hints.segment: if only one certificate can be used, prefer using the larger one
hints.hint: If only one certificate is allowed, use the larger value one

hints.segment: pay the rest with your 7447 card
hints.hint: Charge any remaining balance to my card ending in 7447
